title: Kumar
overview: A young girl leaves an elderly rich lover, who has a wife and grown-up children, for the sake of a young man. But soon, disappointed in him, the pregnant woman returns back. The girl's mother comes to her daughter to sort out what is happening, but she does not want to talk to her. The mother is forced to turn to her ex-lover, the girl's father, so that he can take care of his daughter in the future. The girl's father only now finds out that he has a daughter. But he doesn't know that his own daughter is his young lover.
